query:
INSERT INTO auth_providers
            ( id
            , client_id
            , client_secret
            , enabled
            , created_at
            , updated_at
            )
        VALUES
            ( ?
            , ?
            , ?
            , ?
            , ?
            , ?
            )
        ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
              client_id     = excluded.client_id
            , client_secret = excluded.client_secret
            , enabled       = excluded.enabled
            , updated_at    = excluded.updated_at
